name: Pushy
description: Pushy — reliable push notification delivery service using MQTT for Android, iOS, and web with guaranteed delivery focus.

seo.title: Pushy — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: Pushy: Pushy — reliable push notification delivery service using MQTT for Android, iOS, and web with guaranteed delivery focus.

when_to_use: Guaranteed push delivery via MQTT for critical mobile alerts
Background data sync via MQTT push for Android apps
Reliable push for apps where FCM delivery is unreliable

pros: Reliable delivery is the explicit product focus
Works in regions where FCM is blocked
review.verdict: A delivery-reliability specialist, not a campaign tool; pick when missed pushes are unacceptable.
review.best_for: Apps needing push in China or with strict delivery SLAs
review.not_for: Marketing teams running segmented engagement campaigns

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
